scripts.bootstrap:python: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/.env.example -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.develop.yaml build api worker
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @gastroledger/api-contract run lint && npm --workspace @gastroledger/web run lint && npm run lint:python
scripts.lint:python: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/.env.example -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.develop.yaml run --build --rm --no-deps api ruff check apps/api apps/worker tests/architecture tests/integration
scripts.test: npm --workspace @gastroledger/web run test && npm run test:python && npm run test:integration:postgres
scripts.test:python: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/.env.example -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.develop.yaml run --build --rm --no-deps api pytest
scripts.test:integration:postgres: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/.env.example -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.develop.yaml run --build --rm -e TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://gastroledger:replace-with-local-password@postgres:5432/gastroledger api pytest tests/integration/postgres
scripts.build: npm --workspace @gastroledger/api-contract run build && npm --workspace @gastroledger/web run build && npm run build:containers
scripts.build:containers: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/.env.example -f infra/compose/compose.yaml build web api worker
scripts.dev: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/.env.example -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.develop.yaml up --build
scripts.compose:config: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/.env.example -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.develop.yaml config --quiet
scripts.compose:config:qa: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/.env.example -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.qa.yaml config --quiet
